legalStructure: Maple Cash Management Pool lending arrangement where eligible lenders deposit USDC/USDT and receive LP Tokens; the pool lends to R40-T1 LLC, a standalone single-purpose Delaware SPV of Room40 Capital, with LP Tokens offered under Regulation S and Section 3(c)(1) exemptions.
targetInvestors: Accredited non-U.S. persons that can satisfy KYC and AML screening obligations

metadata.borrowerType: Standalone single-purpose vehicle of Room40 Capital
securitiesExemptionsReferenced: Regulation S under the U.S. Securities Act of 1933
Section 3(c)(1) of the U.S. Investment Company Act of 1940
metadata.feeDisclosure: Target net APY is current 4-week U.S. Treasury bill rate less fees and expenses totaling 50 bps for the USDC Cash Management Pool and 100 bps for the USDT Cash Management Pool; not labeled as a management fee.
